title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF "ALABANG-BAYBAY" IN THE CITY OF LEGASPI TO "SAN FRANCISCO".

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1377 / 49 OG No. 8, 3287 (August, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 930, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF "ALABANG-BAYBAY" IN THE CITY OF LEGASPI TO "SAN FRANCISCO".

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrio of "Alabang-Baybay" in the City of Legaspi shall hereafter be known as "San Francisco".

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1953.
